actions.text: Lewis Hamilton has the chance to close the gap on Michael Schumacher's record seven wins in Canada.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Three chicks have hatched in an osprey nest in Wales.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Luton Town have signed striker Danny Hylton from Oxford United on a three-year deal.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Ronnie O'Sullivan won his first-round match at the China Open.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has died after being found at a West Yorkshire house.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been shot dead in Dublin.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Essex have named an unchanged team for their County Championship match against Glamorgan.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A footballer has been fined for drink-driving.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A rugby league player has signed for Belle Vue.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: IG Doors is building a new factory in Wales.
